title: claytonia sericea
intro: Claytonia sericea, also known as "silvertop miner's lettuce" or "silvertop claytonia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae, native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as calcium and iron, providing health benefits such as improving eye health, boosting the immune system, and supporting bone health. Claytonia sericea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also edible as a leafy green vegetable.
